title: Blood And Stuff
description: Adds Blood Particles to mobs, and soon much more.
body: This mod makes mobs bleed upon taking damage. There are 12 different types of blood including: Wither, Warden, Normal, Slime, Ender And much more. Mobs: A fabric Version is planned but it will most likely happen for a while. THIS MOD MAY CAUSE PREFROMACE ISSUES AND IS NOT DESIGNED FOR FAST PREFORMACE
